MASTER COURT CALENDAR OF AUG-15-2022 -- APPEARANCES BY PAUL GRUWELL, ESQ. FOR PETITIONER LESLIE C. ROBERTS; KEITH GALIANO, SELF-REPRESENTED RESPONDENT -- ASSIGNED TO COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON AUG-15-2022 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 305, JUDGE MARY E. WISS. PARTIES WERE ORDERED TO CONTACT DEPT. 305 BY E-MAIL BY 4:00 PM ON 8/19/22 AND THE CLERK'S PHONE NUMBER WAS ALSO PROVIDED. THE COURT ALSO ASSIGNED CASE TO A MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. PARTIES WERE ORDERED TO CONTACT THE COURT'S ADR COORDINATOR, ELIZABETH KELBER, BY EMAIL BY 4:00 PM ON 8/17/22 FOR SCHEDULING OF THE MSC. THE ADR COORDINATOR'S PHONE NUMBER WAS ALSO PROVIDED. SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00, PAYABLE BY AUG-25-2022, IS IMPOSED ON ATTY. PAUL M. GRUWELL FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE COURT'S ORDER PURSUANT TO THE NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL AND TRIAL ORDER. ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS SET ON AUG-26-2022 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206. OSC WILL BE DISCHARGED IF SANCTIONS ARE PAID PRIOR TO THE HEARING DATE. TRIAL TIME ESTIMATE: 6 DAYS. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; CLERK: JIROQUE; COURT REPORTER: MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

Off Calendar Jul-13-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:

Petition Determining Validity Of Trust
Off Calendar Jul-13-2022 Continued To Aug-15-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Paul Gruwell, in person, for and with Leslie Roberts, Petitioner; Keith Galiano, in person, in propria persona, Objector.

The court notes that it appears as though this matter is not yet ready for trial considering the pending discovery motion set for Jul-29-2022. The court queries regarding the parties' postition regarding trial and of the estimated number of days for trial. Mr. Gruwell estimates a six-day trial. The court questions Mr. Galiano if he agrees with Mr. Gruwell's estimation. Mr. Galiano advises that he has no basis to object to Mr. Gruwell's statement. The court and counsel discuss the mediation attempt and the parties' individual positions regarding participating in ADR. The court reminds the parties that this matter will likely be ordered to participate in some form of ADR after they have been assigned to a judge for trial. After additional discussion, the matter is set for trial in the department of the Presiding Judge (206) on Aug-15-2022 at 9:30 am. Order for the same signed in open court. The parties are advised to monitor the court's register of action to obtain a copy of the order.

Judge: Hon. Cecilia Castellanos. Examiner: Sandra Hilton. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

Off Calendar May-27-2022 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Case Management Hearing
Off Calendar May-04-2022 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Paul Gruwell, via Zoom, for Leslie Roberts, Petitioner; Keith Galiano, via Zoom, in propria persona, Objector.

The court and counsel discuss the submission of separate case management statements, instead of joint statements as ordered by the court. Messrs. Gruwell and Galiano offer testimony as to the reason that separate statements had been filed. The court advises the parties to work together, or the court will consider issuing sanctions. Messrs. Gruwell and Galiano offer updates regarding the status of discovery. The court and the parties discuss the possibility of them participating in mediation with Mr. Gruwell reporting that he is amenable to mediation and Mr. Galiano reporting that he is not open to mediation. Mr. Galiano advises that he has not received verification of supplemental responses to special interrogatories and the court advises Mr. Gruwell to provide the preceding to Mr. Galiano by no later than May-11-2022. After additional discussion, the court encourages the parties to meet and confer and reminds them that it is expecting a joint trial plan as set forth in the court's Case Management Order.

The Case Management Hearing is taken off calendar. The Petition Determining Validity of Trust is continued to Jul-13-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Andam. Not Reported. ?

Petition Determining Validity Of Trust
Off Calendar May-04-2022 Continued To Jul-13-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Case Management Hearing
Off Calendar Feb-23-2022 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Paul Gruwell, via ZOOM, for Leslie Roberts, Petitioner; Keith Galiano, via ZOOM, in propria persona, Objector.

The court advises that the witness list submitted in the joint Case Management Statement does not comply with the court's Case Management Order and that issue will need to be resolved. Mr. Galiano confirms that estate planners have been obtained. The court and counsel discuss the legal standards that govern claims that are missing from the Case Management Statement which require clarification so that the court has a better understanding of the case prior to sending the case to trial. The court also advises counsel that section listing disputed facts should pinpoint said facts. The court advises the parties that the matter will likely at some point be ordered to some form of ADR and that they should meet and confer to discuss the preceding, amongst other issues. The court encourages counsel to act accordingly whenever they meet and confer.

After additional discussion, the Case Management Hearing is taken off calendar. The First Amended Petition, etc., is continued to May-04-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: J. Jeung. Not reported

Petition Determining Validity Of Trust
Off Calendar Feb-23-2022 Continued To May-04-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Case Management Hearing
Off Calendar Dec-15-2021 Off Calendar

Petition Determining Validity Of Trust
Off Calendar Dec-15-2021 Continued To Feb-23-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Keith Galiano, via ZOOM, in propria persona, Objector; Paul Gruwell, via ZOOM, for Leslie Roberts, Petitioner.

Mr. Galiano reports of a breakdown in personal communication with Mr. Gruwell. Mr. Gruwell reports that a previous meeting via ZOOM had been cancelled due to a specific tone that Mr. Galiano presented during the meeting and that moving forward he would prefer that communications with Mr. Galiano be done in writing. The court acknowledges that there is a level of diplomacy where the parties may need to resort to written communication.

After additional discussion, the Petition Determining Validity of Trust is continued to Feb-23-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. The court reminds the parties that the court is expecting another joint case management statement filed with the court ten days prior to the next case management hearing set for Feb-23-2022.

Judge: Hon. Vedica Puri. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

Petition Determining Validity Of Trust
Off Calendar Sep-22-2021 Continued To Dec-15-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Keith Galiano, via ZOOM, in propria persona Respondent; Paul Gruwell, via ZOOM, for Leslie C. Roberts, Petitioner.

The court begins by confirming with Mr. Galiano that he has reactivated his California State Bar license. The court then advises counsel that it will be issuing a Case Management Order which will include several Case Management Hearing dates and a Trial Date. The court also advises the parties that they will likely be ordered to mediation. Mr. Gruwell is instructed to monitor the Court's register of actions to obtain a copy of the order and serve it on all parties who are entitled to notice. Mr. Gruwell then discloses in open court that he briefly worked at the Hanson Bridgett Law Firm. Judge Quinn then makes the same disclosure regarding previously working with Mr. Gruwell when he was a partner at the Hanson Bridgett Law Firm.

After additional discussion, the Status Regarding Representation as Trustee is taken off calendar. The Petition to Determine Validity of Trust is continued to Dec-15-2021 at 9:00 am in Department 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: K. Saephan. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Notice Of Motion To Compel Further Answers To Special Interrogatories (Added For Posting Of The Tentative Ruling)
Off Calendar Aug-06-2021 Off Calendar

Petition Determining Validity Of Trust
Off Calendar Jul-28-2021 Continued To Sep-22-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Paul Gruwell, via ZOOM, for Leslie Roberts, Petitioner; Keith Galiano, via ZOOM, in propria persona, Objector.

The court begins by advising Mr. Galiano that as Trustee, he should be represented by an attorney. Mr. Galiano advises that he was not aware that today's hearing was on calendar for the status of his representation by an attorney. The court again reminds Mr. Galiano that a requirement as a fiduciary is for him to be represented by counsel. The court then turns to the issue of defective notice and asks the parties if anyone is objecting to waiving notice. None are presented. The court then queries Mr. Galiano regarding whether he intends to file objections to the amended petition. Mr. Galiano reports that he does intend to file objections. The court then queries the parties whether they might be amenable to settlement discussions. Mr. Gruwell confirms that he is open to settlement discussions. Mr. Galiano disagrees and believes that it is too early to discuss settlement. The court advises the parties that the court is likely to set Case Management dates at the next calling of this matter. The court also advises Mr. Galiano that a status date regarding representation as trustee will be set.

The Petition Determining Validity of Trust is continued to September 22, 2021, at 9:00 am in Department 204. A Status Regarding Representation as Trustee is set for the same date.

Judge: Hon. Mary Wiss. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: B. Tso. Not reported.

Notice Of Motion To Compel Further Answers To Special Interrogatories; Points & Authorities In Support; Declaration Of Keth Galiano; Exhibits
Off Calendar May-24-2021 Continued To Aug-06-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition Determining Validity Of Trust
Off Calendar May-05-2021 Continued To Jul-28-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Paul Gruwell, via ZOOM, counsel for Leslie Roberts, Petitioner; Keith Galiano, via ZOOM, in propria persona, Objector.

At the outset, the parties are queried as to the status of this matter. Mr. Galiano reports that he believes this matter may resolve via a Motion for Summary Judgment after depositions have been completed. The court then queries Mr. Galiano whether he plans hire counsel to which he replies that he intends to hire counsel but only for limited purposes and is unsure if an attorney will be retained for additional purposes. Mr. Gruwell reports that after his petition was filed, his office received a copy of the 5th amendment to the trust and plans to challenge it and will submit an amended petition within the next few weeks.

After additional discussion, the Petition Determining Validity of Trust Amendment is continued to July 28, 2021 at 9:00 am in Department 204, to allow the parties to conduct discovery. Mr. Galiano's search for counsel should be completed by this date. Additionally, the court advises counsel that future Case Management dates and a trial date will be set.

Judge: Hon. Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

Petition Determining Validity Of Trust
Off Calendar Apr-07-2021 Continued To May-05-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
